summary: Applied ADR 0227 on the live server-resident runtime by routing governed command execution through repo-managed transient `systemd-run` units, staging controller-local file secrets into repo-local runtime paths, pinning the Windmill runtime call path to the guest-local listener, and re-verifying the governed `network-impairment-matrix` command end to end on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/controller_automation_toolkit.py scripts/lv3_cli.py scripts/governed_command.py scripts/governed_command_runtime.py scripts/maintenance_window_tool.py` passed, `python3 scripts/command_catalog.py --validate` passed, and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_maintenance_window_tool.py tests/test_governed_command.py tests/test_governed_command_runtime.py tests/test_controller_automation_toolkit.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py` passed with `66 passed`.

verification.check: Worker converge replay from the isolated worktree
verification.observed: `make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0227-live-apply` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=221 changed=35 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

After extending the runtime mutable-file contract and repairing the pre-existing execution-lane registry file modes, `python3 scripts/governed_command.py --command network-impairment-matrix --requester-class human_operator --approver-classes human_operator --preflight-passed --validation-passed --receipt-planned --param 'NETWORK_IMPAIRMENT_MATRIX_ARGS=target_class=staging --approve-risk'` returned `executed: true`, `returncode: 0`, unit `lv3-governed-network-impairment-matrix-79b10a86f237`, and receipt `/srv/platform_server/.local/governed-command/receipts/lv3-governed-network-impairment-matrix-79b10a86f237.json`.

The successful runtime receipt recorded staged paths for the SSH key, Windmill superadmin secret, and NATS admin password; the stdout log showed the guest-local Windmill route `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fnetwork-impairment-matrix`; and `/srv/platform_server/.local/network-impairment-matrix/latest.json` reported `status: planned`, `target_class: staging`, and `entry_count: 4`.

notes: The first governed replay proved the new `systemd-run` envelope, repo-local secret staging, and guest-local Windmill override, but failed on the pre-existing runtime files `/srv/platform_server/.local/state/execution-lanes/registry.json` and `.lock` because they were still root-owned `0644` files from before the repository declared them mutable.

A one-time live repair was required on `docker-runtime-lv3`: `sudo chmod 0666 /srv/platform_server/.local/state/execution-lanes/registry.json /srv/platform_server/.local/state/execution-lanes/registry.lock`. The committed role change now codifies those files as worker-mutable so future converges keep the correct write contract without manual chmod repair.

Protected integration files still remain for the final merge-to-main step on top of this live-applied branch state: `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, the top-level integrated `README.md` summaries, `docs/release-notes/*`, and `versions/stack.yaml`.
